comments: Tommy's end of show wrap up is missing.

sessions.details: Recorded 1972-10-18 for Bob Harris, first TX 1972-11-13. No known commercial release.
Recorded 1973-08-01 for Bob Harris, first TX 1973-08-13. No known commercial release.
Recorded 1981-02-18. 'Dance To The Music' available on The Friday Rock Show (BBC Records).

track_listing.details: LP-Leaves In The Wind; Street Tunes
